item.description:
Release date: 2026-04-23

Improved

  • Added MLX local models in NameQuick. Apple silicon Macs can now download, prepare, and manage MLX models directly in the app.
  • Made MLX setup and storage behavior more reliable. Model readiness, switching, cleanup, and installed-state handling are more consistent.
  • Improved scanned PDF language handling. Image-only and scanned PDFs now preserve source-language detection more reliably when the selected provider supports it.
  • Cleaned up common currency spacing in default invoice and receipt presets. Generated filenames stay more consistent without manual cleanup.

Fixed

  • Fixed MLX runs that could stall during model switches or leave stale installed state behind after delete flows.
  • Fixed MLX structured extraction edge cases where valid field output could be ignored.
  • Fixed preset activation getting stuck behind a missing popup and failing to count the first preset in some flows.
  • Fixed checkout failures caused by picking a currency the selected product did not actually support.

Polished

  • Prepared large images and scanned PDFs more safely before sending them. This reduces oversized requests and makes cancellation more responsive.
  • Clarified MLX model delete messaging. It is easier to tell what stays installed and what can be removed to save space.
  • Clarified BYOK trial and upgrade messaging after a trial is exhausted.
